---
title: "Clue 2"
---

```{=html}
<div class="clue-page clue-liquid">
<div class="liquid-bg">
  <div class="liquid-blob liquid-blob-1"></div>
  <div class="liquid-blob liquid-blob-2"></div>
  <div class="liquid-blob liquid-blob-3"></div>
</div>
<div class="clue-box">
  <h1>Clue 2</h1>
  <p>Stars align in patterns only the patient can read. Placeholder content — replace with your actual clue.</p>
  <p><a href="../">Back to the Heart</a></p>
</div>
</div>
```
